parsed.production_notes: The video is a standard screen recording combined with a webcam picture-in-picture. The presenter's movements, speech patterns, and the screen interactions appear natural and human-driven.

characters.appearance: A young adult male with a medium build and fair complexion. He has short, curly brown hair and a short beard and mustache.
characters.wardrobe: A plain black crew-neck t-shirt and white wired earphones.

scenes.setting: Digital workspace, dark mode color palette

panels.panel_visual_description: A solid dark gray background fills the entire frame. The surface is completely uniform in color and texture. There are no visible objects, characters, or light sources within this space. The dark tone creates a high-contrast backdrop for any elements placed over it. The composition is entirely flat and static.

Character A is framed from the chest up in a medium close-up shot. He is positioned centrally within the frame, looking directly forward. He wears a simple black crew-neck t-shirt and has white wired earphones hanging down from his ears. The background behind him is a plain, softly lit, light-colored wall. The lighting on his face is even and natural, highlighting his features clearly. He exhibits subtle head movements as he speaks.

scenes.visual_description: A screen recording of a dark-themed web interface is shown. In the bottom left corner, there is a square picture-in-picture video of Character A speaking. Large white text overlays are visible at the top and bottom of the screen. Character A dictates a sentence, which appears as text on the screen. He then uses his cursor to manually edit a specific word within the text.
scenes.audio_transcript:
Character A says: His name is Gary Shukrun. [His name is Gary Shukrun.]
Character A says: And Shukrun is not exactly written like this, that's more like Choukron. [And Shukrun is not exactly written like this, that's more like Choukron.]
